understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game was to maneuver the selectable pieces (P/S in the semantic_grid) onto goal tiles, possibly involving pushing blocks and managing multiple selectables to solve spatial puzzles.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement shifts the selected piece by one cell (3 pixels) per action in the chosen direction. Pushable objects like blocks can be pushed if adjacent, and walls may block or restrict movement differently depending on their type. Selection between multiple selectable pieces is accomplished by using the CLICK action with the target piece's coordinates.
